question: India ke sabhi districts ki ek alphabetized list provide karo, jo unke respective states ke basis par organize ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Assam ke districts ke naam batao jisme ek se zyada rural sub-district ho, alphabetical order mein sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' AND T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Bihar state ke andar sabhi districts ki ek alphabetical list provide karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Bihar state mein sabhi districts ki list banao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar';

question: Assam state ke andar jo sub-districts hain, unke naam aur area types list karo, alphabetical order mein naam ke hisaab se sorted.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo, alphabetically sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Assam ke top paanch districts ke naam batao jo ek se zyada sub-district rakhte hain, aur unhe reverse alphabetical order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME DESC LIMIT 5

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'

question: Sabhi districts ki ek list provide karo, alphabetically organize karo state ke basis pe aur fir district name ke basis pe.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: Andaman and Nicobar Islands ya Nicobars district ke liye, saare states ke names aur unke corresponding districts list karo, alphabetically state ke hisaab se sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Nicobars' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: India ke saare districts list karo, aur unke state ke naam bhi batado.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T3.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India';

question: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sab sub-districts ke names aur area types list karo, alphabetically sort karna area type aur name ke hisaab se.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T3.TYPE_OF_AREA ASC, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Assam state ka naam confirm karo, un states ki list se jinke paas district information record hai.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';

question: Har state ke liye districts ki ginti pata karo, aur state ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME;

question: Assam mein aise districts ke naam batayein jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' EXCEPT SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar'

question: Assam aur Andaman and Nicobar Islands ke states mein sabhi districts list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';

question: Sare rural sub-districts ki ek alphabetical list banao, jismein unke names aur IDs shamil hon.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Har state ke liye, area type ke hisaab se sub-districts ki sankhya ka breakdown do, state name ke alphabetical order mein sort karo aur phir highest count ke basis pe.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC

question: Assam ke districts identify karo jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' AND T1.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar')

question: September 2020 ke allopathic outpatient attendance figures dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.MONTH_NAME = 'September, 2020' AND T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2020'

question: Ek list banao jismein 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' ka naam ho, saath hi saare rural sub-districts ke names bhi hon.
gold_sql: SELECT STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE WHERE STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' UNION SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'

question: Sub-districts ko identify karo jo sirf urban areas ke category mein aate hain aur unme koi rural hissa nahi hai.
gold_sql: SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' EXCEPT SELECT SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT WHERE TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Sub-districts ke saare naam list karo jo sirf urban areas mein classified hain, alphabetically sort karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance wale sub-districts dhundho, lekin 2021 mein inka koi attendance report nahi hua ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0

question: Saal dar saal allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronological order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.YEAR_VALUE, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID GROUP BY T3.YEAR_VALUE ORDER BY T3.YEAR_VALUE ASC

question: 2022 ke saare allopathic outpatient attendance ka monthly breakdown do, highest se lowest volume ke order mein ranked.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T3.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_YEAR AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID WHERE T1.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: December 2022 ke outpatient IDs aur unke allopathic attendance counts list karo, sirf recorded visits wale, aur attendance ke hisaab se highest se lowest sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.OUTPATIENT_ID, T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.MONTH_NAME = 'December, 2022' AND T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T1.OUTPATIENT_ID, T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC HAVING SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 ORDER BY T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC DESC

question: 2022 ke months ko allopathic outpatient visits ke total number ke basis par highest se lowest tak rank karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: 2022 ke months ko unke total allopathic outpatient attendance ke hisaab se rank karo, highest se lowest tak.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: Kaunse sub-districts ne 2021 aur 2022 dono saal mein outpatient services record kiye the?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE IN ('2021', '2022') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T4.YEAR_VALUE) = 2

question: Saal ke hisaab se, rural aur urban dono areas mein total allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronologically order karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.YEAR_VALUE, SUM(T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T4 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T4.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T4.TYPE_OF_AREA IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T2.YEAR_VALUE ORDER BY T2.YEAR_VALUE ASC

question: Top 5 states kaun se hain jinke paas sabse zyada rural sub-districts hain?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Woh sub-districts pata karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui thi, lekin 2021 mein aisi koi attendance nahi thi.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Rural sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui hai, lekin un sub-districts ko exclude karo jinke urban areas mein bhi usi saal reported attendance ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 0

question: Kaun se rural sub-districts ne saal 2021 mein 5,000 se zyada allopathic outpatient attendance record ki thi?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 5000

question: Sabhi gaon ke ilakon ke naam, unke sambandhit district aur state ke saath list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Assam state ke saare districts ko alphabetical order mein list karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Batao immunization IDs aur unki counts, jo 10 saal se zyada umar ke bachon ke liye hain, jinhe TT10 ya TD10 vaccines rural areas mein 2021 ke dauraan diye gaye, aur ise vaccinated bachon ki sankhya ke hisaab se sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT_ID, T1.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T1.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 > 0 ORDER BY T1.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10

question: 2021 ke liye, sub-district aur area type ke hisaab se, 10 saal se zyada aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ka total immunization count provide karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: Batao 2021 mein 10 saal se zyada aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ki immunization ka total number, sub-district aur area type ke hisaab se.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA

question: Sub-districts ko rank karo, unke basis par 2021 mein 10 aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ko mili adolescent immunizations ki total sankhya ke hisaab se, lekin jinme koi records nahi hai unhe chhod kar.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) DESC

question: Top 5 rural sub-districts kaun se hain jahan 2021 mein 10 saal se zyada umar ke bacchon ko sabse zyada immunization mila?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 2022 ke saal wale mahino ya phir 5,000 se zyada allopathic outpatient visits record karne wale mahino ko pehchaan karo, aur unhe alphabetically sort karke dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.MONTH_NAME FROM FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000.0000000000000000 OR T3.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' ORDER BY T2.MONTH_NAME
